summary: A long clip of a press event. Three women stand at a lectern, the center one speaking, each holding framed photographs of young people. The backdrop carries text including CRIME ENGAGEMENT and a TOLL-FREE VOICE HOTLINE with a phone number 855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423) and hours Monday through Friday 8 A.M. to 8 P.M. ET. A black-and-white photo of a young woman is displayed at the upper left.

script.scene: Three women at a lectern hold framed photos of young people; backdrop shows a TOLL-FREE VOICE HOTLINE number.
The center speaker continues addressing the room while holding a photo.
Continued footage of the women at the lectern with the VOICE hotline backdrop.

notable_text: CRIME ENGAGEMENT; TOLL-FREE VOICE HOTLINE; 855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423); Monday - Friday 8 A.M. - 8 P.M. ET
